历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11296 → 5967 → 7570 → 6943 → 6864. In 2022, due to changes in exam difficulty, the ranking advanced significantly. In the following three years, it fluctuated narrowly within the range of 6864–7570. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 6864, with a fluctuation range of about 600 positions over the past three years, showing an overall stabilizing trend. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 544 in 2021, 561 in 2022, 561 in 2023, 542 in 2024, and 561 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 548, a decrease of 13 from 2025 (a reduction of about 2.3%), which is moderate and has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 14th in 2021, 11th in 2022, 12th in 2023, 15th in 2024, 15th in 2025, and 16th in 2026, consistently among the top 20 nationally, making it a top-tier comprehensive university. In 2026, its reputation evaluation was clearly negative (51 incidents, 46 negative), mainly involving teacher ethics, academic misconduct, and other public opinion. In 2023, the reputation was also clearly negative (12 incidents). In 2022, it was neutral/mixed. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranked 35th (relatively hot), with above-average short video exposure. Regarding historical admission anomalies, 2022 was medium concern, 2023 was high concern (12 anomaly signals), and negative public opinion had a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it had 19 disciplines rated A- or above: Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A, Chinese History A, Marxist Theory A, etc., which are highly matched with Physics Category enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mathematics, etc.), demonstrating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Computer Science was recommended as hot, Electronic Information/Communication was highly recommended as hot (76.86), Electrical Engineering was highly recommended as hot (74.28), Clinical Medicine was recommended (70.19), and Stomatology was recommended (72.31). Sichuan University's advantageous engineering and medical majors have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Chongqing is approximately 209,000, with an estimated 135,850 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 65%, a slight decrease of about 2.6% from 139,478 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competitive pressure. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, which is geographically adjacent and culturally similar to Chongqing, providing natural regional appeal to Chongqing candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 6864, the 2.3% reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (pushing the ranking forward), the clearly negative university reputation (inhibiting some application willingness), the high social popularity of advantageous engineering and medical majors (enhancing appeal), and the slight decrease in the total number of local candidates (slightly easing competition), combined with a small forward adjustment due to negative reputation public opinion, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6719, with a range of 6219–7219.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6219–7219, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Mathematics, Cyberspace Security) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (flagship majors, Computer Science) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Engineering Pilot Classes) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6200), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>7200), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a backup.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1007 → 1002 → 1266 → 1250 → 1300. It stabilized around 1000 in 2021–2022, then shifted to the 1266–1300 range after 2023, with a cumulative backward shift of about 300 places over the past three years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1300, showing a slow backward trend. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 77 in 2021, 71 in 2022, 67 in 2023, 79 in 2024, and 81 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 75, a decrease of 6 from 2025 (a reduction of about 7.4%), which is relatively significant and tightens the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 16th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, firmly in the top 20 nationally, making it a top-tier comprehensive university. In 2026, its reputation evaluation was clearly negative (51 incidents, 46 negative), mainly involving teacher ethics, academic misconduct, and other public opinion issues. In 2023, the reputation was also clearly negative (12 incidents). Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 35th (relatively hot). In terms of historical admission anomalies, it was medium concern in 2022 and high concern in 2023, with negative public opinion having a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Related advantageous disciplines in History Category include Chinese Language and Literature (A+), Chinese History (A), Law (A-), Marxist Theory (A), and Archaeology (A-), demonstrating strong liberal arts strength and strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Law showed differentiation and wait-and-see, while Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese was recommended (60.00). The social popularity of Sichuan University's liberal arts majors is moderately high. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Chongqing general college entrance examination is approximately 209,000, with an estimated 73,150 in History Category based on the recent proportion of about 35%, roughly flat compared to 73,373 in 2025. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, geographically adjacent to Chongqing with similar culture, providing natural regional appeal to Chongqing candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1300, the 7.4% enrollment reduction in History Category for 2026 (pushing the ranking forward), the clearly negative university reputation (inhibiting some application willingness), the strong liberal arts disciplines (enhancing appeal), and the roughly flat total number of local candidates, a small forward correction is made due to the relatively large enrollment reduction. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1192, with a range of 1049–1335.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 四川大学在重庆市医学类近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年11296名（计划96人）、2022年5246名（计划104人）、2023年5740名（计划108人）、2024年6722名（计划113人） 、2025年6864名（计划104人）。从2022年起，位次数字持续增大，表明医学类录取竞争逐年加剧。2026年医学类招生计划缩减至85人，较2025年的104人减少约18.3%，缩招幅度 显著，对位次产生较大影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家'985工程'和'211工程'重点建设高校，入选国家'双一流'建设高校（A类）。其华西医学中心在口腔医学、临床医学等领域享有极高声 誉，对全国考生具有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业长期处于报考热度高位，尤其是四川大学的口腔医学、临床医学等王牌专业，在西南地区乃至全国都具有标杆地位。重庆市作为直辖市，考生基数稳定，对优质医学 教育资源的竞争持续激烈，近年来医学类位次持续走高的趋势也印证了这一点。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算结果及历年位次趋势，2026年四川大学在重庆市医学类最低录取位次预计约为6162名，波动区间为5854至6470名。2026年大幅缩招使得位次数字较2025 年有所减小（更容易进），但近年持续上升的报考热度形成部分抵消，最终预测位次较M3主值小幅上修。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Sichuan University's Medicine category in Chongqing over the past five years are: 2021: 11296 (planned 96 students), 2022: 5246 (planned 104 students), 2023: 5740 (planned 108 students), 2024: 6722 (planned 113 students), 2025: 6864 (planned 104 students). Since 2022, the ranking numbers have been continuously increasing, indicating that competition for admission to Medicine has intensified year by year. In 2026, the enrollment plan for Medicine is reduced to 85 students, a decrease of about 18.3% from 104 in 2025, a significant reduction that greatly impacts rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a national 'Double First-Class' construction university (Category A). Its West China Medical Center enjoys a very high reputation in fields such as Stomatology and Clinical Medicine, strongly attracting candidates nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medicine majors have long been at the peak of application popularity, especially Sichuan University's flagship majors like Stomatology and Clinical Medicine, which are benchmark disciplines in Southwest China and even nationwide. As a municipality directly under the central government, Chongqing has a stable candidate base, and competition for high-quality medical education resources continues to be intense. The recent trend of continuously rising rankings in Medicine also confirms this.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the calculation results of the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's Medicine category in Chongqing in 2026 is expected to be approximately 6162, with a fluctuation range of 5854 to 6470. The significant enrollment reduction in 2026 causes the ranking number to decrease compared to 2025 (easier to enter), but the continuously rising application popularity in recent years partially offsets this, resulting in a final predicted ranking slightly revised upward from the M3 main value.
